lines.english: In love and attachment to Maya, he has no understanding at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧੇ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhe kichhoo na soojhai guramat naam pragaasee he |14|
lines.english: The blind, self-willed manmukh sees nothing; through the Guru's Teachings, the Naam is gloriously revealed. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣਾ ਘਰੁ ਨ ਸਮਾਲਹਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਵਿਗੂਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: apanaa ghar na samaaleh ant vigoote |
lines.english: They do not watch over their own homes, and are ruined in the end.
The manmukhs are asleep in egotism and Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਹੁ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਜਾਲੈ ਦੁਖੇ ਦੁਖਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: par nindaa kareh bahu chintaa jaalai dukhe dukh nivaasee he |15|
lines.english: They slander others, and burn in great anxiety; they dwell in pain and suffering. ||15||
He blesses the Gurmukh with understanding.
The Creator Himself has created the creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate man niramal naame naam nivaasee he |16|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Naam - their minds become immaculate; they dwell in the Naam, and only the Naam. ||16||5||
Maaroo, Third Mehl:
I serve the One Lord, who is eternal, stable and True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਾਚੇ ਹੀ ਸਾਚਿ ਪਤੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramatee sadaa sach saalaahee saache hee saach pateejai he |1|
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, I praise the True Lord forever, pleased with the Truest of the True. ||1||
Attached to duality, the whole world is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਗੁਣ ਬਹੁਤੇ ਮੈ ਏਕੁ ਨ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: tere gun bahute mai ek na jaataa |
lines.english: Your Glorious Virtues are so many, Lord; I do not know even one.
The Life of the world, the Great Giver, attaches us to himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਭੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape bakhase de vaddiaaee guramat ihu man bheejai he |2|
lines.english: He Himself forgives, and bestows glorious greatness. Following the Guru's Teachings, this mind is delighted. ||2||
The Word of the Shabad has subdued the waves of Maya.
Egotism has been conquered, and this mind has become immaculate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਰਸਨਾ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਵੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sahaje gun gaavai rang raataa rasanaa raam raveejai he |3|
lines.english: I intuitively sing His Glorious Praises, imbued with the Lord's Love. My tongue chants and savors the Lord's Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਘੜੀ ਮੁਹਤੁ ਨਿਹਾਲੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਆਰਜਾ ਛੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jamakaal gharree muhat nihaale anadin aarajaa chheejai he |4|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death watches over him every moment, every instant; night and day, his life is wasting away. ||4||
The self-willed manmukh does not understand; he wanders around in ignorance.
Crying out, "Mine, mine!" he spends his life.
He practices greed within, and does not understand.
He does not see the Messenger of Death hovering over his head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਚਿ ਲਾਗੇ ਤਿਨ ਸਾਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo sach laage tin saachee soe |
lines.english: Those who are attached to the Truth are true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਕਮਾਣਾ ਸੁ ਅਗੈ ਆਇਆ ਅੰਤਕਾਲਿ ਕਿਆ ਕੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aithai kamaanaa su agai aaeaa antakaal kiaa keejai he |5|
lines.english: Whatever one does in this world, will come to face him in the hereafter; what can he do at that very last moment? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad sadaa jan sohai |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, His humble servant is exalted forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਹਾ ਸਿਰਿਆ ਕਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਭੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: duhaa siriaa kaa khasam hai aape aape gun meh bheejai he |6|
lines.english: He is the Lord and Master of both worlds; He Himself delights in virtue. ||6||
The self-willed manmukhs, attached to duality, weep and wail.
This mind is enticed by the Naam, the source of nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਮੈਲੁ ਪਤੰਗੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਭੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: maaeaa moh mail patang na laagai guramatee har naam bheejai he |7|
lines.english: It is not stained at all by the dirt of attachment to Maya; through the Guru's Teachings, it is pleased and saturated with the Lord's Name. ||7||
The One Lord is contained within all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਇ ਸਾਚੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: haumai maar sadaa sukh paaeaa naae saachai amrit peejai he |8|
lines.english: One who subdues his ego, finds lasting peace; he drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar of the True Name. ||8||
By Guru's Grace, He is revealed.
God is the Destroyer of sin and pain.
The Gurmukh serves Him, and contemplates the Word of the Shabad.
The world is burning in the fire of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਭੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh aape aap varatai guramukh tan man bheejai he |9|
lines.english: He Himself is pervading everything. The Gurmukh's body and mind are saturated and pleased. ||9||
The Gurmukh extinguishes this fire, by contemplating the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੰਦ੍ਰ ਇੰਦ੍ਰਾਸਣਿ ਬੈਠੇ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eindr indraasan baitthe jam kaa bhau paaveh |
lines.english: Even Indra, seated upon his throne, is caught in the fear of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: antar saant sadaa sukh paaeaa guramatee naam leejai he |10|
lines.english: Deep within are peace and tranquility, and lasting peace is obtained. Following the Guru's Teachings, one is blessed with the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮੁ ਨ ਛੋਡੈ ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jam na chhoddai bahu karam kamaaveh |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death will not spare them, even though they try all sorts of things.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਤਾ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਪੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: satigur bhettai taa mukat paaeeai har har rasanaa peejai he |11|
lines.english: When one meets with the True Guru, one is liberated, drinking in and savoring the sublime essence of the Lord, Har, Har. ||11||
Through devotional worship, the Gurmukh obtains peace and tranquility.
There is no devotion within the self-willed manmukh.
They are bound by the three qualities - the three gunas; they are far away from liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਪਾਵਨ ਸਦਾ ਹੈ ਬਾਣੀ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਅੰਤਰੁ ਭੀਜੈ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: pavitr paavan sadaa hai baanee guramat antar bheejai he |12|
lines.english: Forever pure and sanctified is the Word of the Guru's Bani; following the Guru's Teachings, one's inner being is drenched in it. ||12||
I have considered Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva.
